title: Expert Validation Loop v0

sources.label: Candidate Hypothesis Review Question Set v0
Case-To-Cure Stage Validator And Owner Map v0

limitations: Does not send outreach, prepare completed outreach, ingest private replies, copy private correspondence, publish unpublished expert comments, disclose private reviewer identities, imply endorsement, imply consensus, upgrade claims by issue metadata, or make artifacts expert-reviewed.

Does not contain patient-identifying data, real case facts, private records, portal exports, molecular reports, pathology reports, flow reports, genomics reports, images, notes, raw assay values, therapy histories, exact dates tied to a person, facilities tied to a person, clinicians tied to a person, sponsor contacts, contact details, private case IDs, private workspace paths, private prompts, or re-identification keys.

Does not authorize clinical interpretation, trial-status verification, sponsor or site verification, patient matching, trial matching, target actionability, source ranking, evidence ranking, target ranking, mechanism ranking, product ranking, therapy ranking, trial ranking, option ranking, private-lab work, legal clearance, regulatory readiness, ethics readiness, security readiness, retention decisions, emergency handling, publication, or publication of case-derived learning.
Does not validate public learning extraction, end-to-end synthetic dry-run, or master-completion audit semantics.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured or that a vaccine has been found.
